I Used AI To Make Viral UGC Ads in 5 minutes | Capcut Commerce Pro
Try CapCut commerce pro for Free 👉  https://bit.ly/49IOBNr

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/

I tried out Capcut Commerce pro to make viral ecommerce ads & AI UGC ads in less than 5 minutes. With this new AI tool you can make viral ads in a matter of minutes. The Ai writes the script, generates the videos and puts everything together with a viral editing style to create your ads. Right now there is a limited free trial going on where you can test out capcut commerce pro.

The UGC ads have a lot of different ai avatars that you can choose from to customize your videos. They even have christmas characters right now for the holidays.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com

Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
